data.name: Lily's Erotic Potion Delivery
data.detailed_description:
After receiving a request for a potion delivery from the town guard, Lily is sent off on what should have been a relatively simple mission, take the potion through the forest and into town, an easy task for a familiar like Lily.

That is, until the arrival of a mysterious cult threatens to corrupt everything!

Join Lily as she adventures through everything from slime monsters and tentacles to dark mages and eldritch gods on her quest to get laid deliver a potion to the town guard!

Fight Powerful Enemies Using Potions and Magic

Enemies will attack Lily in real-time, so make sure to prepare carefully! Craft potions to heal yourself or your allies, or to throw them at enemies to poison or blast them away! Cast powerful magic spells with the help of the spirits, and try to avoid enemy attacks to stay on your feet and off the ground!

Level Up and Grow Stronger

Everything from throwing potions and casting spells to getting laid will increase your combat power! Gather plants and defeat monsters to work on your intelligence and strength, and play around at night to increase your charisma and endurance.

Summon Spirits to Help You Fight

Befriend the spirits to borrow their power and cast fireballs and magic lasers! Be careful not to overwork them though, or they'll run off when you need them most!

Meet New Companions

Joining Lily is a colorful cast of characters, including the swordsman Andrew who interrupts rescues her from a spicy situation, Eillana, a shy magical researcher whose curiosity is impossible to sate, and more!

Fully-Animated Hand-Drawn 2d Art

20+ fully-animated and hand-drawn events to see, complete with a scene gallery for later viewing pleasures.

Get... Pregnant Repeatedly?

Help the local monster and human populations by reproducing with the slimes and frolicking with the tentacle monsters!

Each creature has its own unique mating rituals and requirements, with everything from slimes not quite wanting to leave on their own to shadow cores needing dense corruption to grow properly!

Keep track of their progress with the status screen, which can give detailed information about Lily's pregnancy progression at any time!

data.short_description: Join Lily in this top-down action RPG as she goes on an adventure to deliver a mysterious potion.... and possibly get laid along the way! Craft potions and call upon the power of spirits as you fight or bang your way through lecherous slimes, perverted hooligans, a mysterious erotic cult, and more!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 2GH Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 280X / GeForce GTX 760
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: AMD FX-6300 / Intel Core i5-4590
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 290 / GeForce GTX 1050 Ti
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
